actions.instruction: Join with a slip stitch to the first single crochet

rounds.sourceText: With grey yarn: Magic loop, ch1, 7sc, slst to the first sc.
rounds.title: Round 1

actions.note: Change back to grey yarn on the final yarn over of the last single crochet

actions.instruction: slip stitch for joining to a different round

rounds.sourceText: Ch1, sc inc in the same st, sc inc, change to white yarn: (sc inc)x5. Change back to grey yarn on the final yo of the last sc, and slst to the first sc.
rounds.title: Round 2

actions.instruction: in the same st to complete the first hdc inc
in the same st to complete the first hdc inc
to the top of the first ch2

rounds.sourceText: Ch2 (count as 1hdc), 1hdc in the same st to complete the first hdc inc. Hdc inc, 1hdc; Change to white yarn: Hdc inc, 1hdc, hdc inc, (1sc, sc inc) repeat 2 times, hdc inc, 1hdc, hdc inc; Change back to grey yarn: 1hdc. Slst to the top of the first ch2.
rounds.title: Round 3

actions.note: same st; to complete the first hdc inc
same st; to complete the first hdc inc

rounds.sourceText: Ch2 (count as 1hdc), 1hdc in the same st to complete the first hdc inc, (hdc inc)x3; Change to white yarn: 1hdc, 1hdc+1sc, 1sc, sc inc, 9sc, sc inc, 1sc, 1sc+1hdc, 1hdc; Change back to grey yarn: hdc inc. Slst to the top of the first ch2.
rounds.title: Round 4

rounds.sourceText: Ch2 (count as 1hdc), 3hdc, (hdc inc)x3; Change to white yarn: 3hdc, 2sc, (sc inc, 4sc) repeat 2 times, sc inc, 2sc, 3hdc; Change back to grey yarn: (hdc inc)x3. Slst to the top of the first ch2, and fasten off.
rounds.title: Round 5

rounds.sourceText: Third loop only. With grey stitches on top, join new yarn to the 4th grey stitch from the right. Ch3 (count as 1dc), 1dc in the same st to complete the first dc inc, 8hdc, dc inc, ch3; [dc inc, 8hdc, dc inc, ch3] repeat 3 times, omit the final ch3. Instead, work ch1, then 1hdc into the top of the first ch3.
rounds.title: Squaring

warnings.message: Expected 37 produced stitches, but expanded to 49.
warnings.sourceText: Third loop only. With grey stitches on top, join new yarn to the 4th grey stitch from the right. Ch3 (count as 1dc), 1dc in the same st to complete the first dc inc, 8hdc, dc inc, ch3; [dc inc, 8hdc, dc inc, ch3] repeat 3 times, omit the final ch3. Instead, work ch1, then 1hdc into the top of the first ch3.

rounds.sourceText: Ch3 (count as 1dc), 1dc in the same corner, 1dc in each st around, (2dc, ch3, 2dc) in each corner as you go. When you return to the starting corner, work (2dc, ch3), slst to the top of the first ch3, fasten off.
rounds.title: Border

actions.note: 4th grey stitch from the left; white yarn

actions.instruction: slip stitch for joining to a different round

rounds.sourceText: With grey stitches on top, join white yarn to the 4th grey stitch from the left. Ch2, (1dc, ch-1 pic, 1dc) in the next st, ch2, slst to the next st. Fasten off and weave in the ends.
rounds.title: Inner Ear

actions.instruction: Join grey yarn to the st immediately to the right of the inner ear join (the 5th grey st from the left)
actions.note: the st immediately to the right of the inner ear join (the 5th grey st from the left)
the same grey st used for the inner ear's final slst

rounds.sourceText: Join grey yarn to the st immediately to the right of the inner ear join (the 5th grey st from the left), ch1. Now we crochet along the inner ear part and work in the TLO: sk the initial ch, 2sc, sc inc, 2sc, ch1. Slst in the same grey st used for the inner ear's final slst. Fasten off, and weave in your ends.
rounds.title: Ear Edge

rounds.sourceText: Repeat the ear instructions on the opposite side, leaving a 5-stitch for symmetry. (Join white yarn for the inner ear in the 3rd grey stitch from the right.)
rounds.title: Wolf's Right Ear

actions.instruction: These 2 chains count as 1 half double crochet.
These 2 chains count as 1 half double crochet.
Join to the top of the first ch2.

rounds.sourceText: Magic loop, ch2(count as 1hdc), 9hdc, slst to the top of the first ch2.
rounds.title: Round 1

warnings.message: Expected 10 produced stitches, but expanded to 9.
warnings.sourceText: Magic loop, ch2(count as 1hdc), 9hdc, slst to the top of the first ch2.

actions.instruction: slip stitch for joining to a different round

actions.note: leave a long tail for attaching

rounds.sourceText: Ch1+1sc, 1sc in each st around, slst to the first sc. Fasten off, leave a long tail for attaching.
rounds.title: Round 2

warnings.message: Expected 8 produced stitches, but expanded to 7.
warnings.sourceText: Ch1+1sc, 1sc in each st around, slst to the first sc. Fasten off, leave a long tail for attaching.

actions.instruction: Turn the muzzle over so the wrong side faces out. Position it on the lower center of the head and sew it firmly in place. You can add a small amount of stuffing before closing.

rounds.sourceText: Turn the muzzle over so the wrong side faces out. Position it on the lower center of the head and sew it firmly in place. You can add a small amount of stuffing before closing.
rounds.title: Attach the Muzzle

actions.note: Stitch the nose on the muzzle.

rounds.sourceText: Stitch the nose on the muzzle.
rounds.title: The Nose

actions.instruction: Make two French knots for the eyes.
Use pink yarn to stitch the blushes just below the eyes for a finished look.

rounds.sourceText: Make two French knots for the eyes. Then, use pink yarn to stitch the blushes just below the eyes for a finished look.
rounds.title: Eyes & Blushes
